zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Twyford於大約1285年出生在英國英格蘭德比夏爾拉德布恩時，她的父親John de Twyford41歲，母親Margaret de Derbyshire24歲。她和Edward de Chandos至少有2個兒子和4個女兒。她去世於1356年之後在她的家鄉，埋葬在英國英格蘭德比夏爾拉德布恩。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Twyford于大约1285年出生在英国英格兰德比夏爾拉德布恩时，她的父亲John de Twyford41岁，母亲Margaret de Derbyshire24岁。她和Edward de Chandos至少有2个儿子和4个女儿。她去世于1356年之后在她的家乡，埋葬在英国英格兰德比夏爾拉德布恩。

nameMeanings.name: Twyford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places calledTwyford, for example in Berkshire, Buckinghamshire, Derbyshire,Hampshire, Leicestershire, Lincolnshire, Middlesex, and Norfolk, fromOld English twī- ‘double’ + ford ‘ford’.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Twyford was born about 1285, in Radbourne, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John de Twyford, was 41 and her mother, Margaret de Derbyshire, was 24. She had at least 2 sons and 4 daughters with Edward de Chandos. She died after 1356, in her hometown, and was buried in Radbourne, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Twyford est née environ 1285, à Radbourne, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John de Twyford, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Derbyshire, avait 24 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles avec Edward de Chandos. Elle est décédée après 1356, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterrée à Radbourne, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Twyford um 1285 in Radbourne, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Twyford 41 und ihre Mutter Margaret de Derbyshire 24. Sie hatte mit Edward de Chandos mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1356 in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Radbourne, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Twyford è nata il circa 1285 nel Radbourne, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John de Twyford, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Margaret de Derbyshire, aveva 24 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie con Edward de Chandos. Morì dopo il 1356, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolta a Radbourne, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Twyfordが約1285年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアラドボウルンで生まれた時，父John de Twyfordは41歳，母Margaret de Derbyshireは24歳であった。彼女はEdward de Chandosとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1356年以後に故郷で死去し，イギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアラドボウルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Twyford(이)가 대략 1285년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 라드보우른에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Twyford(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret de Derbyshire(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 Edward de Chandos(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1356년 이후 그녀의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 라드보우른에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Twyford nasceu aproximadamente 1285, em Radbourne, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John de Twyford, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Derbyshire, tinha 24 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas com Edward de Chandos. Ela faleceu após 1356, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultada em Radbourne, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Twyford родилась около 1285 г. в местности радбурн, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John de Twyford было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Derbyshire, 24. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери от Edward de Chandos. Она умерла после 1356 г. в её родном городе и была похоронена в местности радбурн, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Twyford nació aproximadamente 1285, en Radbourne, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John de Twyford, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Margaret de Derbyshire, tenía 24 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas con Edward de Chandos. Murió después de 1356, en su pueblo, y fue sepultada en Radbourne, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
